calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Tomar Mason, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rose Miller #5041.

Paul Perdue, Esq. appeared for and with plaintiff(s) Betty A. Lai, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Gerald C. Roerden, Bonanza Management Company and American Chinese Investment Group, Inc. dba King Sing Restaurant for Judgment as follows:
Rental agreement is canceled.
Pat-due rent $12,000.00 and hold over damages - $6,900.00
Attorney's Fees - $2,075.00
Costs - $723.00
Total judgment in the amount of $21,698.0

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
